sections.paragraph:
Original: אלקשׁי

Transliteration: 'elqôshı̂y

Phonetic: el-ko-shee'

BDB Definition:

Elkoshite = "God the ensnarer"
  1. a native and/or descendant of Elkosh (location unknown)

Origin: patrial from a name of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
